title: Republic Emergency Broadcasting System
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Emergencybroadcasting.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The screen showing the message]]
The '''Republic Emergency Broadcasting System''' was a message utilized when the office of [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] issued [[Republic Executive Directive 9302-84121|Republic Executive Directive 93021-84121]] as a result of the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and the issuing of the [[Emergency Powers Act/Legends|Emergency Powers Act]]. The message revealed that the channel which was originally occupied by [[HoloNet News/Legends|Holonet news]] had been reserved for military use, presumably by the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone forces]]. It also indicated that the reader should adjust the [[Subspace transceiver/Legends|transceiver]] to other, approved government channels to gain information.

This reservation was to take place for the duration of the emergency.

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsAd|url=meta/img/off.jpg|text=Republic Emergency Broadcast System}}
